en: Like a jail cell, a penitentiary My time spent there, it only made me sick
And I don't ever wanna be like you I don't wanna do the things you do
ko: 난 절대 너처럼 되고 싶지 않아

en: I'm never gonna hear the words you say And I don't ever wanna, I don't ever wanna be you
ko: 너의 말을 절대 듣지 않을 거야

en: Don't wanna be just like you Or what I'm saying is
This is the end, then throw all your hands up, yeah
Go to college, or university Get a real job, that's what they said to me
But I could never live the way they would
ko: 하지만 난 그들이 원하는 방식으로 살 수 없어

en: I'm gonna get by, and just do my time At a step, while they all get in line
ko: 난 그저 버티고 내 시간을 보낼 거야

en: I'm just a minor threat, so pay no mind
ko: 난 단지 작은 위협일 뿐이니 신경 쓰지 마
